title: Buttery Velvety Korean Beef Stir-fry
description: A post-workout Croatian dish featuring a keto-friendly version of the classic Mars Bar stir-fry that cooks under high pressure for an easy and indulgent meal.
instructions: Preheat your pressure cooker according to manufacturer's instructions.
In a large bowl, mix the beef strips with all-purpose flour and soy sauce until evenly coated. Season with cayenne pepper.
To the pressure cooker, add sliced mushrooms and drizzle with butter. Cook for about 1 minute on high heat.
Add the seasoned beef to the mushroom mixture. Cook under high pressure for 5 minutes (pressure-cooker setting).
Open the cooker slightly before reducing heat to low. Let sit in a warm marinade-like sauce until ready to serve.
Sprinkle grated parmesan cheese on top and cook for an additional minute to let the cheese melt, creating that velvety texture.
